summary: Design-system-driven UI refactor of panel/index.js from mobile-sized elements (44px controls, 16px spacing, indigo accent) to compact IDE/DevTool layout (20-24px controls, 2-4px spacing, green #22C55E accent) following ui-ux-pro-max specifications. The panel currently exceeds its 120px default height with just the fixed UI elements (180px+ minimum). The refactored layout fits within 66px for fixed elements, leaving room for search results.
approach: Sequential 4-phase rewrite of a single file (panel/index.js) plus i18n updates: (1) Complete CSS rewrite establishing compact design tokens and all component styles with dark OLED palette, (2) HTML template restructure to merge rows, simplify states, and convert settings modal to full-panel page, (3) JS rendering method updates to produce compact HTML matching the new CSS, plus settings page toggle logic, (4) i18n key updates and full integration verification. Each phase builds on the previous, ensuring CSS is correct before HTML changes, and HTML structure is correct before JS rendering updates.

design_decisions.decision: Replace indigo #6366f1 accent with green #22C55E across all UI
design_decisions.rationale: Green semantically matches primary action (add component = success/go). Design system mandates green for CTA.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Less visual distinction between accent and success states

design_decisions.decision: Convert settings modal to full-panel page replacement
design_decisions.rationale: Current 520px modal exceeds 300-450px panel width. Full-panel view eliminates overlay complexity and width constraints.
design_decisions.tradeoff: User loses context of main view while in settings; back navigation adds a state to manage
alternatives: Collapsible accordion embedded in main view

design_decisions.decision: Use margin-based spacing instead of flexbox gap
design_decisions.rationale: Flexbox gap not supported in Electron 2 (Chromium 58). grid-gap is safe but flex gap is not.
design_decisions.tradeoff: More verbose CSS with > * + * selectors; slight maintenance overhead
alternatives: Target Electron 3+ only and use grid-gap
Use padding on children instead of gap

design_decisions.decision: Single-column flat list for search results instead of grid
design_decisions.rationale: 300-450px width cannot meaningfully support multi-column. Flat list maximizes visible items at 22-24px per row.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Less visual density at wider panel sizes (400px+)

design_decisions.decision: Compact 20px component bar chips with horizontal scroll
design_decisions.rationale: Horizontal scroll preserves keyboard reorder (A/D keys) which depends on linear order. Wrapping would complicate reorder logic.
design_decisions.tradeoff: Only 2-3 chips visible at a time at 300px width

data_flow.diagram: CSS Tokens -> Component Styles -> HTML Template -> JS Rendering -> DOM Output

stages.output: Styled rules for all UI elements
Static DOM structure with binding IDs

conventions: All CSS inline in style/template string properties
No flexbox gap (Electron 2 compat) - use margin

dimensions.completeness: All design system requirements covered across 4 tasks
dimensions.granularity: 4 tasks, each 1-2 hours scope, sequential dependency chain
dimensions.dependencies: Linear chain TASK-001 -> 002 -> 003 -> 004, no circular deps
dimensions.convergence_criteria: All criteria quantified with specific values (px, counts, IDs)
dimensions.implementation_steps: 4-6 steps per task with specific actions
dimensions.constraint_compliance: Electron 2 compat, $ bindings, IPC contracts all addressed
